title: Mineable Unmineable
description: Allows you to mine End Portal Frames with no strings attached.
body:
# What?
This is a mod that allows the End Portal Frames to be mineable. Be it for moving portal back home or troll friends is up to you.

# Where?
This mod does NOT add recipe to End Portal Frames. You'll have to find it at strongholds if you don't have a mod to add such recipe. **This mod has to be present on both side.**

# When?
I made it a while ago and didn't really plan to publish it on Modrinth but it's here now for convenience's sake

# Who?
This mod is perfect for some lightly modded SMPs that wants some more flexibility in their End Portal placements.

# How?
When you break a complete End Portal Frames, the portals inside it should break as well.

# Why?
So there's a mod that added recipes to end portal frames but didn't allow the breaking of End Portal Frames and someone in a server had problem where they misplaced it and can't break it.

# Modpack?
yes modrinth
